davis-richard.text: Richard Harvey Davis (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-14.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Richard Harvey Davis had raised $31,761 and spent $31,761 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Richard Harvey Davis (not currently a member of Congress).

weber-randy.text: Randy K. Weber, Sr. (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-14.
No public FEC campaign finance data in our set for Randy K. Weber, Sr..

On 7-Jan-2025, Randy K. Weber, Sr. voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-14. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Randy Weber (REP) won by about 37.37 points out of 306195 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Randy K. Weber, Sr.'s policy positions.
No public data in our set on Richard Harvey Davis's policy positions.
